name: Purifying Spoon (Tablespoon)
description:
A phrase of luck is carved into the handle of this wooden tablespoon. While a variety of other cutlery with similar properties exists, a spoon is often the most convenient and inconspicuous to carry.

Activate - Purify (2 Actions) (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You stir the spoon in food or drink, casting Cleanse Cuisine on the substance as you stir. This larger spoon can purify up to 8 gallons of food or drink.
